gestures.mdmPrompt: a person steps slightly forward, opens arms wide, and smiles while passionately explaining multiplication as repeated addition
a tutor points forward with right hand and leans slightly while inviting students to solve 4 times 3 together
a teacher leans forward slightly, opens both hands with palms up, encouraging students to think about 5 times 2
a person lifts right hand to point upwards while confidently asking, what is 3 times 6?
a tutor stands tall, extends arms wide while reconnecting the idea of groups, explaining multiplication clearly
a teacher raises left hand to count 3 times 4, moving fingers rhythmically while inviting students to join
a person shifts weight back, opens arms wide again to encourage students as they attempt to solve 3 times 6
